## 🧪 Validation

<!-- List the exact commands and runtime/device checks performed. -->

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run check:flutter` when Flutter changed
- [ ] `bun run docs:build` when documentation changed
- [ ] `bun run docker:check` when deployment/API packaging changed
- [ ] Real browser/device verification for visible UI changes

## 📸 Visual evidence

<!-- Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes; otherwise write N/A. -->

## 🔐 Safety and privacy

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, databases, signing material, or private location data
- [ ] Failure paths remain non-crashing and user-readable
- [ ] Documentation and environment examples match the implementation
